name: Valentine's Day Small Giftable Candy Pillow - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of charm to your Valentine's Day decor with this Candy Pillow from Spritz™. This decorative accent, crafted from polyester, features a delightful multicolor design that brightens any tabletop. Measuring 14 inches in width, 7 inches in height, and 3.25 inches in depth, it's a perfect small giftable item. Celebrate the season with this playful piece that adds a sweet flair to your home or office space.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
